# EgreedAI

> Rwanda-first AI assistant built in Kigali by Egreed Technology LTD. Supports Kinyarwanda, English and French with authentic Rwandan and African context.

EgreedAI is a multilingual chat assistant owned and operated by Egreed Technology LTD for Rwandan students, businesses, educators, founders and everyday users. It is tuned for Rwanda and East Africa: Kinyarwanda language nuance, Rwandan history, local education needs, Kigali business context, software development, cloud hosting, cybersecurity and practical daily assistance.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Chat with EgreedAI, the Rwanda-first AI assistant
- [Builder](/builder): Build and export pages with AI assistance
- [Kinyarwanda AI Evaluation](/kinyarwanda-eval): Evaluate Kinyarwanda response quality
- [Model Evaluation](/model-eval): Compare AI response quality
- [Knowledge Base](/knowledge): User-authenticated private knowledge base

## Rwanda-focused use cases
- Kinyarwanda writing, translation, summarization and learning support
- Homework help and digital skills support for Rwandan students
- Business planning, customer support drafts and software ideas for Kigali startups
- Localized AI support in English, French and Kinyarwanda

## About the company
- Name: Egreed Technology LTD (EgreedTech)
- HQ: KN 4 Ave, Gasabo, Kigali, Rwanda
- Founded: 4 May 2026 (registered with RDB)
- Services: School management systems, web & software development, cloud hosting, AI/ML, cybersecurity, IT consulting, computer training
- Contact: egreedtechnology@gmail.com — WhatsApp +250 795 822 290
- Website: https://egreedtech.org
